architectural_rules_locked.statement: shared/utils.py must never import either project config.py
architectural_rules_locked.mechanism: shared functions receive config-dependent values as parameters from the caller
architectural_rules_locked.pattern: each project defines thin wrappers that inject its own config values once
architectural_rules_locked.violation_consequence: sys.modules caching — first import config wins, subsequent imports return cached version regardless of sys.path order
architectural_rules_locked.origin: Day 15 bug — hdb_analyser.py failed with ImportError on API_BASE_URL because shared/utils.py had imported stock-monitor/config.py first

architectural_rules_locked.statement: SESSION_LEDGER.md and DATA_DICTIONARY.md completed at end of every session without exception
architectural_rules_locked.enforcement: cut scope before cutting the close — never defer

shared/utils.py.added: architectural rule comment block at module header

new_parameters.name: use_live_agents
new_parameters.description: True=real API calls, False=load from fixtures

new_parameters.name: capture_fixtures
new_parameters.description: True=save live responses to disk as fixtures

new_parameters.name: fixture_dir
new_parameters.description: caller passes project fixture directory — never constructed here

call_llm.fixture_dir_source: built from fixture_dir parameter, not hardcoded stock-monitor path

new_parameters.name: fixture_path
new_parameters.description: full path to fixture JSON file — caller passes from their own config

new_parameters.name: capture
new_parameters.description: caller passes their own capture flag

new_parameters.name: env_path
new_parameters.description: path to .env file — caller passes from their own project directory

new_parameters.name: project_tag
new_parameters.description: prepended to email subject for inbox filtering

stock-monitor/stock_monitor.py.change_type: project wrappers added + call sites updated

bug_fixed.issue: except block returned single string value — caller expected (str, dict) tuple causing ValueError: too many values to unpack
bug_fixed.fix: except block now returns (f'Could not generate this section: {e}', {'input': 0, 'output': 0})

hdb-analyser/.env.issue: stale API key causing 401 authentication errors on all Claude calls
hdb-analyser/.env.fix: replaced with correct key matching stock-monitor/.env

shared/.gitignore.reason: shared/ was previously a nested git repo — .gitignore was missing, __pycache__ files were committed

git_fixes.issue: hdb-analyser and shared were stored as submodule pointers (160000 commit) not tracked folders (040000 tree)
git_fixes.cause: both had nested .git folders from prior separate repo initialisation
fix_sequence: git commit -m 'convert hdb-analyser and shared from submodules to tracked folders'
git_fixes.verified: git ls-tree HEAD shows 040000 tree for all three project folders

stock_monitor.result: complete — 0 errors, 0 warnings, all 37 fixtures loaded

hdb_analyser.result: complete — 7 analyst sections, 8 translator sections, full briefing generated

deferred_to_day_16.spec: OQ-005 in OPEN_QUESTIONS.docx has full column list, types, derived fields, amenities table

deferred_to_day_16.detail: ~170,000 rows, 500 per API call, loop until exhausted, delta-pull with natural key de-dup
lat/lng on every transaction row at insert time — mandatory for proximity scoring
natural key: month + block + street + flat_type + storey_range + resale_price. INSERT OR IGNORE. Idempotent.
weight = 1 / months_since_transaction. Per town + flat_type. National baseline for value_assessment.
6 dimensions: value(25%), lease(25%), proximity(30%), price_delta(10%), recency(5%), floor(5%). Weights in HDB_RANKING_WEIGHTS config dict.
buyer identifies block + flat type + storey range. Tool retrieves matching transactions, runs analyst against new schema, returns full briefing.

ranking_funnel: Stage 4 one Claude call on 15-20 rows

session_close_documents_updated: DATA_DICTIONARY.md — Day 14 carried constants included, Day 15 delta complete
OPEN_QUESTIONS.docx — OQ-005 fully expanded with ranking architecture, proximity design, price delta, wargame failure modes

day_16_session_opener.step_2: Confirm Day 16 scope against this spec and master plan
day_16_session_opener.step_3: Design hdb.db schema in full — confirm with Mack before writing any code
day_16_session_opener.step_4: Build in sequence — schema first, fetch second, scoring third, Workflow 2 last
day_16_session_opener.non_negotiable: session close — SESSION_LEDGER.md and DATA_DICTIONARY.md before any commit
